title: Thread Lifecycle: Suspending and Resuming
description: A flowchart illustrating the states and method calls involved in suspending and resuming a thread in Java, highlighting its deprecated nature.
relationships: start() transitions from New to Runnable
Scheduler selects thread to go from Runnable to Running
suspend() (deprecated) forces transition from Running to Suspended
resume() (deprecated) transitions from Suspended back to Runnable
run() method completes to transition from Running to Dead
